property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\app\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\app\jdk-17\bin;C:\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Python312\;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Meld\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\app\far;C:\Program Files (x86)\Gpg4win\..\GnuPG\bin;C:\app\apache-tomcat-9;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\app\apache-maven-3.8.8\bin;C:\Program Files\RedHat\Podman\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\app\gradle-8.13\bin;C:\app\sbt\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSSAMCLI\bin\;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSSAMCLI\bin;C:\app\flyway\;C:\app\ffmpeg-2025-09-18\bin;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.1.1\bin;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2024.2.3\bin;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Programs\Windsurf\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.3.2.2\bin;;C:\tools\mysql\current\bin;C:\app\cmd;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\PowerToys\DSCModules\;C:\Users\madsu\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;.

testcase.name: testUnsupportedCountry

Use the DisableJMX annotation to override the default setting.

Split[bean(simple{${body}}, getEntries) -> [Log[Processing single entry: ${body.key}], SetHeader[CamelHttpMethod, constant{POST}], To[http://localhost:8082/germany/v1/tax?bridgeEndpoint=true]]], getEntries)</expressionDefinition> <log message="Processing single entry: ${body.key}"/> <setHeader name="CamelHttpMethod"> <constant>POST</constant> </setHeader> <to uri="http://localhost:8082/germany/v1/tax?bridgeEndpoint=true"/> </split> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </route>
<route xmlns="http://camel.apache.org/schema/spring" id="germany-tax-route"> <from uri="direct:germany-route"/> <log message="Processing German Tax Data"/> <split parallelProcessing="true"> <expressionDefinition>bean(simple{${body}}, getEntries)</expressionDefinition> <log message="Processing single entry: ${body.key}"/> <setHeader name="CamelHttpMethod"> <constant>POST</constant> </setHeader> <to uri="http://localhost:8082/germany/v1/tax?bridgeEndpoint=true"/> </split> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </route> 2026-03-22T22:20:15.959+01:00 INFO 9808 --- [integration-service] [ main] org.apache.camel.builder.AdviceWith : AdviceWith route after: Route(france-customs-route)[From[direct:france-route] -> [Log[Forwarding to France Customs via Kafka], Marshal[org.apache.camel.model.dataformat.JsonDataFormat@627d5f1], To[kafka:france-customs-topic?brokers={{kafka.brokers}}&lazyStartProducer=true], SetBody[CrossBorderResponse(requestId=null, status=PENDING, message=Request forwarded to France Customs asynchronously, processedBy=null, data=null)]]] 2026-03-22T22:20:15.962+01:00 INFO 9808 --- [integration-service] [ main] org.apache.camel.builder.AdviceWith : Adviced route before/after as XML: <route xmlns="http://camel.apache.org/schema/spring" id="france-customs-route"> <from uri="direct:france-route"/> <log message="Forwarding to France Customs via Kafka"/> <marshal> <json library="Jackson"/> </marshal> <to uri="kafka:france-customs-topic?brokers={{kafka.brokers}}&lazyStartProducer=true"/> <setBody> <expressionDefinition/> </setBody> </route>
